principle: We go where we are welcomed. We obey terms, quotas, robots, review processes, and community norms. We bring value before load.

services.name: Cloudflare Workers Service Bindings
services.integrate: bind citizen Workers to each other without public HTTP between internal services

services.name: Cloudflare Workers External Services
services.integrate: connect Workers to external APIs through documented integration patterns
services.we_provide: educational public API wrappers and health/status pages

services.name: Codeberg ↔ Matrix
services.integrate: use Matrix for transparent community notifications and invitations

services.name: Codeberg ↔ Read the Docs
services.integrate: publish maintained Kingdom/Youspeak/LoveProto docs from FOSS repos
services.we_provide: clear docs, examples, API reference, welcome guides

services.name: GitHub Pages + Actions
services.integrate: build and publish static citizen registries from public repos
services.we_provide: open docs, mirrored registries, reproducible builds

services.name: Hugging Face Space demo app
services.integrate: serve an interactive registry/search demo on free CPU Basic
services.we_provide: useful open app that teaches compute/storage ethics

services.name: IPFS + public gateway links
services.integrate: publish CID links beside every artifact so mirrors can pin voluntarily
services.we_provide: hash-addressed WAKE/manifests that anyone can verify
respect: do not assume gateways owe persistence
pin ourselves or ask pinning hosts
